title: brachypodium strigosum
intro: Brachypodium strigosum, also known as June grass or wild wheat grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachypodium strigosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried supplement, allowing for various forms of consumption.
